commands.review_summary:
The PR makes local-model lean embedded runs derive structured Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, preserves explicit operator Tool Search settings, and updates related docs/config help.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +117 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a failing-bug reproduction: this PR is a proposed default-behavior change. Source inspection confirms current main does not apply the new derived Tool Search default, and the PR adds focused tests for the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is protected and the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of an upgrade-visible runtime default, not an autonomous cleanup or repair branch.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- default `agents.*.experimental.localModelLean` to compact Tool Search controls when no operator `tools.toolSearch` preference is set
- keep explicit `tools.toolSearch` configuration authoritative, including `false`
- document the local-model lean default in public docs, config help, and exported config comments so small/local model users get a smaller prompt-facing tool catalog without losing tool reachability

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599. This is a complementary small-model prompt/tool-pressure mitigation; the direct stream-starvation fixes from that issue are https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87818 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88153.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Lean local-model agents no longer receive a huge direct tool catalog by default when Tool Search can compact it behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`. Operator-facing config help now also names the Tool Search default and the `tools.toolSearch: false` opt-out.

Real environment tested: focused Vitest wrapper, docs formatting, diff check, AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate, and targeted Ollama Cloud live provider smoke. Blacksmith Testbox proof is still blocked locally by missing Blacksmith auth, so the broad remote gate used direct AWS Crabbox.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.hints.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
git diff --check
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed
OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_MODEL=glm-5.1:cloud OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_WEB_SEARCH=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_EMBEDDINGS=0 node scripts/test-live.mjs -- extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts --reporter=dot
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `42f8774d257`; formatting passed; focused wrapper passed four Vitest shards / 100 tests; docs formatting reported `Docs formatting clean (660 files)`; diff check passed. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_3e888713a54e`, slug `blue-crayfish`, run `run_d65eaa650fec`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`, selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`. Targeted Ollama Cloud live smoke passed earlier on runtime head `fda5bdfce761` with `extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts`: `2` tests passed and `2` skipped intentionally because web search and embeddings were disabled for that run; the follow-up commit only aligns config help/type comments.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean` applies compact Tool Search defaults only when the operator did not configure Tool Search, the embedded runner uses the derived runtime config for control-tool exposure and cataloging, and generated/operator config help now describes the new default plus opt-out. Ollama Cloud still runs through the live provider path with the same runtime checkout.

What was not tested: local Ollama daemon model execution was not rerun because the local endpoint had no usable model list during validation. Non-Ollama small-model API families were not run because no matching API keys or auth profiles were available in this environment.
target.author: vincentkoc
